items.title: Hydrate IV Bar Partnership Proposal — Call This Week
items.summary: Hydrate IV Bar is proposing a co-branded IV therapy partnership for Miami and Houston locations. They have budget allocated and want a 20-minute call Thursday or Friday.
items.actionNeeded: Respond to meeting request for Thursday or Friday to discuss partnership proposal.

items.title: UPQODE Website Launch Blocked — Approval Needed Today
items.summary: UPQODE team is blocked waiting for final approval on website copy changes. They have a client demo tomorrow morning and need resolution today to push to production.
items.actionNeeded: Review and approve website copy changes ASAP to unblock production push before tomorrow's demo.

items.title: LeadMaker SDR Proposal Follow-up
items.summary: LeadMaker is following up on their full-time SDR proposal for inbound lead management and appointment setting discussed in a previous call.
items.actionNeeded: Review SDR proposal and decide whether to schedule call to discuss candidates.
